# Play 3D Audio Once

**Menu:** `Actions/Audio`

**Serialized name:** `Play3DAudioOnce`

**Source class:** `C:/Users/Lucas/AndroidStudioProjects/ITsMagic/ITsMagicEngine V2/app/src/main/java/com/itsmagic/engine/Engines/Engine/NoCode/Nodes/Actions/Audio/Play3DAudioOnceNode.java`

**Top flow input:** `Yes`

**Top flow output:** `Yes`

## Purpose

Executes the `Play 3D Audio Once` action inside the NoCode flow.
